task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Data Entry application in DHIS2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data Entry' app interface is visible in the web browser, typically indicated by the header or the selection panel for Org Unit, DataSet, and Period.

task_completion.description: The correct organization unit (Ngelehun CHC) and period (January 2024) are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the selection panel, 'Ngelehun CHC' is highlighted in the organization unit tree (under Sierra Leone > Southern Province > Bo > Badjia), and 'January 2024' is selected in the Period dropdown.

task_completion.description: A relevant Child Health or Immunization dataset is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Set dropdown shows a selection matching 'Child Health', 'Immunisation', or 'EPI'.

task_completion.description: The correct values for BCG, OPV, and Penta doses are entered into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the data entry table, the input fields contain the following exact numbers: BCG: 47, OPV 1: 38, OPV 3: 32, Penta 1: 40, Penta 3: 35.

task_completion.description: The correct values for Measles, Yellow Fever, and Fully Immunized children are entered into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the data entry table, the input fields contain the following exact numbers: Measles/MR 1: 28, Yellow Fever: 25, Fully immunized children: 22.

task_completion.description: The data entry form is marked as complete.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Complete' button at the bottom of the data entry form has been clicked, or there is a visual indicator/message showing the dataset is marked as 'Complete' or 'Completed'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser interface (like Chrome, Firefox, etc.) is visible, showing the DHIS2 web application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The data was entered into the actual DHIS2 Data Entry web form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields are part of the standard DHIS2 tabular layout for data entry, not a separate spreadsheet, text editor, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to manipulate the DOM and fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspector, Console, etc.) are not open in the screenshots where the final data and completion status are shown.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Organization Unit: Ngelehun CHC. Target Period: January 2024 (202401). Target Dataset Keywords: Child Health, Immunisation, EPI. Expected Values to be entered: BCG: 47, OPV 1: 38, OPV 3: 32, Penta 1: 40, Penta 3: 35, Measles: 28, Yellow Fever: 25, Fully immunized: 22. The task requires the form to be explicitly marked as complete.
